mapper.insert: INSERT INTO web_push_subscription (endpoint, user_id, p256dh, auth) VALUES (#{endpoint}, #{userId}, #{p256dh}, #{auth}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = #{userId}, p256dh = #{p256dh}, auth = #{auth}
mapper.select: SELECT s.endpoint, s.p256dh, s.auth, f.ingredient_name AS ingredientName, f.expire_date AS expireDate, f.member_id AS memberId FROM fridge_item f INNER JOIN web_push_subscription s ON f.member_id = s.user_id WHERE f.expire_date = CURDATE() + INTERVAL #{daysLeft} DAY
